# General Information {#sec-general-info .unnumbered}

::: callout-note
## Website URL

[{{< var url >}}]({{< var url >}}){style="font-size:2em"}

![](figures/qr_code.png)
:::

## Notebooks

- [01-Descriptive-Statistics-Class.ipynb]({{< var colabPrefix >}}01-Descriptive-Statistics-Class.ipynb)

- [Discrete distributions](https://www.desmos.com/calculator/8qjdx4zkhg)

- [The uniform distribution](https://www.desmos.com/calculator/cwqbsrgjpr)

- [The Central Limit Theorem](https://colab.research.google.com/github/febse/econ2026/blob/main/03-CLT.ipynb)

- [The Normal distribution](https://www.desmos.com/calculator/nnyfn7xq1h)

- [OLS - intercept only](https://colab.research.google.com/github/febse/econ2026/blob/main/03-Least-Squares-Intercept.ipynb)

- [OLS - simple](https://colab.research.google.com/github/febse/econ2026/blob/main/03-Least-Squares-Simple.ipynb)

- [OLS Geometry](https://www.desmos.com/geometry/k2yatxmvnl)

- [OLS Class](https://colab.research.google.com/github/febse/econ2026/blob/main/03-1-Least-Squares-Class.ipynb)

- [Multiple Regression](https://colab.research.google.com/github/febse/econ2026/blob/main/08-Multiple-Regression-Class.ipynb)

- Multiple Regression (1)\[https://colab.research.google.com/github/febse/econ2026/blob/main/08-Multiple-Regression-Data-Generation.ipynb\]

- [OLS with one predictor](https://colab.research.google.com/github/febse/econ2026/blob/main/03-Least-Squares.ipynb)

- [t-test and p-values](https://colab.research.google.com/github/febse/econ2026/blob/main/06-Simulation-Class.ipynb)

## Time Series Notebooks

- [Introduction](https://colab.research.google.com/github/febse/econ2026/blob/main/01-Time-Series-Intro.ipynb)
